description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark gable roof and a mix of wood and light-colored exterior walls. The front facade features large windows and a prominent entryway, while the rear opens to a spacious patio with a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and landscaped greenery including palm trees. A glass-roofed sunroom or greenhouse is attached to one side, and a small, round, glass-domed structure is present at the back. The house includes multiple balconies and terraces, providing ample outdoor living space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and contemporary materials.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, large windows, a pool, and landscaped outdoor areas, featuring wood and glass elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a wood-paneled facade.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the round glass-domed structure and backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, patio, balconies, and extensive outdoor seating areas.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the greenhouse/sunroom and garden with palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, minimal steps, and a covered porch area with clean lines and no ornate decoration
